reviews.review_text: Love the rooms so cute and perfect size 600 m from water and near peir for fishing lots of fishys

Kanasta yes!

We loved our weekend. Kanasta is such a gem . The kids loved the run around, the gaming room, the playground !

We stayed in cabin 6 and was 6 of us ! So many lovely details in furnishings the cabin and I absolutely love all those plants and succulents you find Round the caravan park.
10 Min from the Pier , quiet and peaceful e enjoying the fresh air while sitting on the outdoor patio.

Customer service was spot on the girls looked after us while booking and all was perfect.

We will absolutely be back guys 😌
Great little park tucked away in a quiet location.

Very good service here, comfortable cabin & cooking stove in the cabin too (electric stove) with a gas BBQ too, game room (pool table, tennis table & coin slot gaming) & playground for kids, quiet too you cant go wrong - 15 Sept 2025
Awesome place very clean Cabine 54. Great location

We had to find a different caravan park that was pet-friendly and Kanasta gave us a cabin for one night, My therapy dog in training, Matilda was declined from a camping site we went to before. When we got to our cabin I took her for a walk and she gave the place "Matilda's Sniff of Appreciation" which was a great sign! The Bunk-beds are comfy and it's walking distance from the beach! Overall I give it 4 stars!
Unfortunately not long after arriving we could not continue with our accomodation. The staff provided excellent customer service to us. We are very grateful.

Kanasta caravan park was lovely! We stayed for 3 nights, and we were very well taken care of.

There was 2 tvs with netflix, plenty of cutlery and crockery, sugar and salt, and also milk in the fridge. There was a hairdryer provided also, which was very useful.

When we needed a place to store our luggage after check out time, they provided it to us free of charge, and even arrived at our cabin early in the morning to show us how to use the stove.

The shared bathrooms are beautiful and well maintained, as is the barbecue spot.

It is also only a 10 minute walk from rye pier.

Overall, I really enjoyed the stay, and would definetely go again!
Love to stay here, good vibes, good location and we will come back again for sure 😆
Next to Rye beach. Caravan Park is hidden in between the residential area. More of Retro caravans. Small park with a play area and games room. Nice and cosy.

Stayed to visit the nearby hot springs and it is in such a great location, walking distance to the Main Street of Rye. Best part is it’s dog friendly which we struggled to find in this area with a caravan. This park is mostly cabins but they can accept some caravans to get in! The owner and all the staff were lovely.

The park bathrooms were clean, and looked to be newly renovated, kind of like a hidden gem. They had a games room with arcade games, pool and ping pong tables plus an outdoor play area for kids.
TOPS!!!!
We stayed here with our dog in a cabin and found the park very well run and people running it very friendly and helpful.

Really lovely and clean . We enjoyed our stay at the kanasta Caravan Park. A few mins drive to the town centre and pier. Our furry friends can come with us is just extra bonus. Highly recommend!
The lady at the reception also very helpful abd lovely.
the great place to chill

We stayed at Kanasta in a 2 bedroom cabin for 3 nights. Cabin was lovely. Super clean, spacious and bright. Beds were comfy and shower was hot with good water pressure. Location was great, a lovely quiet street yet so close to the main shops and Rye pier. Playground is great but definitely designed for older kids. Nonetheless, my 2 year old still enjoyed it. The staff we came across in our stay were friendly and helpful. All in all, a great stay and we’d definitely stay again.

Good for stay with your children and pet  🐶.
If you want to cook hot plate with cutlery and pans , kettle, toaster , microwave everything is available. If you have food left you have a Refrigerator.
I think it's so cool and nice to enjoy a holiday. Small park for your children to play and nice environment.
I love it ❤️

Near to the shops  just 2 min drive if you want to get something . 👍🏼

We booked retro caravan elizabeth.  Just right in front of all the amenities. Perfect for small family.

Overall, surrounding is nice and quiet. Good for the kid to ride their bike.
Service was amazing, rooms cozy and accomodating.
Clean and tidy up room. Awesome location and good value for stay. It is truly room like photos said.

My daughter and I had a lovely stay in a two bedroom cabin and got an upgrade which was nice. Only negative was it was freezing as I couldn't get the split system heater to work . Possibly operator error lol. Didn't want to bother Tess the lovely lady that we a saw on check in . We would definitely come back though to stay as was close to the hot springs.
It was a small but overall comfy caravan park. Place I stayed was comfy and cute, amenities were nearby and owner was very welcoming and kind.
Great little family getaway, cabin was great, warm and had all that was needed 👌 kids loved the bunk beds and play park.
Mid week winter stay. Super quiet spot tucked away in a back street. Modern, bright 2 bedroom cabin. Clean, warm and great value. Highly recommend.
We loved our comfy cabin! It was clean & all necessities where supplied.
Perfect spot if you want to experience the hot baths peninsula spring 4 min drive, or relax at rye Beach, clean caravan park with friendly people.
A great get-away for the family. Just a side note, WiFi was unstable.
Such a neat camping ground AND lets you have dogs in the cabins! Gave us a really lovely family weekend away (including our whole family - the dog!) thank you!
Beautiful  spot to stay.

We booked our cabin the day that we came down and had a great experience - the women on reception was helpful, responsive and friendly. Our daughter LOVED the bunk room!
They kindly upgrade our cabin as it seemed like it was a quiet time - mid week, which we were very grateful for!
Was a lovely little cabin, has all the essentials and was a great stay! Would recommend for a no fuss, affordable stay in a great location!

Small caravan park, but awesome location, probably 10 minute walk to the beach and shops. Furniture very badly stained from previous guests. Only one car park per cabin. Would try somewhere else if going back that way.

It is very friendly and good service the showers are like a powerful hose and take a while to get hot.
My basic summery is that I give it 4 stars⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Stayed overnight in a cabin, Nov 2024.  Receptionist was very friendly and helpful with booking and arrival.  Cabin was not as clean as I would have expected.  The rim of the toilet when you lifted the seat had not been cleaned for a long time. (zoom photo) I did phone receptionist who was very apologetic, said she would send the cleaner around, I advised I’d already given it a good clean.  When booking, I advised I needed twin share as travelling with a friend.  Only the double bed was made up, so I had to make up one of the bunk beds.  Outdoor setting had cobwebs over the chairs.  The best thing about this cabin was the shower, the water was nice and hot (if you have kids, beware) and the water pressure was perfect.  Park is in a good location, not far from Peninsula Hot Springs.  If cabin was cleaner I would have given them 4-5 stars.  We paid $165 for the night.

We booked a last moment stay at Kanasta

Big thanks to the staff for making it a lovely few nights and helping when we needed some :)

We stayed in Lola ( retro camper ) was a great experience. Shared bathroom area was spotless and modern and the overall feel of the place was quiet and safe.

If you want a good value, well located place to stay for a few nights ! Don’t hesitate  in booking

What a wonderful Caravan Park! We booked there for a week-end and and absolutely enjoyed it 🤗 The late check in has been so easy, and the staff were very communicative and organized ! The site is very clean and the cabin very comfortable. We definitely recommend it and will come again.
Thank you for everything,
Alice

Great little place to stay, just out of the busy section, but close enough to walk to the beach in a few minutes. The caravan part is a bit small and tight, but has what you need, - laundry, games room, playground etc.
Clean, quiet and beautiful little caravan park. We booked a cabin for a few days and really enjoyed the close location to the beach. Residents were super friendly and staff were super helful

A lovely, quiet caravan park in a fantastic location. Friendly hosts, very clean cabins, brilliant shower! Nice little touches added which don’t go unnoticed and add quality and cosiness! Will definitely be back!
Lovely little caravan park. Bathrooms are incredibly clean.

It was my first pleased experience staying in the Caravan. The room was nice, neat, and well set up. Sharing toilets and showers were clean. Our kids loved the games room. They have BBQ  and outside eating area.
Great location, just 10 mins walking down to the beach, shops.
Activities: playing mini golf in Rosebud the town nearby; visiting Sorrento for café / meals.
Nice little van park, we stayed in a cabin and was comfy and quite.
Well appointed villa unit in walking distance from our function.  Staff provided us an early entry which every thing go smoothly.

Stayed at Kanasta Caravan Park last week for a few days and definitely the place to be. Smooth check in , Courteous and respectful staff , clean and tidy cabins , walking distance to shops and restaurants. Will stay there again. Well done Kanasta Caravan Park for your excellent services.
Great decent priced basic stay. Appreciate the easy service

I've just returned from a lovely stay at Kanasta Caravan Park.
I arrived late and called the after hours number on arrival. The friendly staff directed me to where I could pick up my key. The welcome pack had a map of the park but didn't need it as I was given clear directions.

The staff had put the heater on before arrival which was a really nice touch. The cabin was really smart and well presented with all the little things you need (kettle, toaster, wine glasses...

It was reassuring to see the night manager do a walk through the park and I felt safe and secure the whole time. I don't have a dog, but the park allows them. So it was good to see dogs walking with their owners on lead.

I really enjoyed the closeness to Rye. My family was able to walk tot he pub for a lovely meal and not have to worry about driving. We needed some help to get extra towels as my kids dropped them on the floor and the staff were friendly and helpful.

It was lovely waking up and seeing the park in the daylight. It is really pretty with a mixture of cabins and on-site vans which are all nicely presented. The games room was also a great diversion for the kids on the wet day and the communal toilets look like they've just had a revamp. My only complaint was being beaten on the pool table!

Happy to recommend. I'll be back!

I've just returned from a lovely stay at Kanasta Caravan Park.|I arrived late and called the after hours number on arrival. The friendly staff directed me to where I could pick up my key. The welcome pack had a map of the park but didn't need it as I was given clear directions.||The staff had put the heater on before arrival which was a really nice touch. The cabin was really smart and well presented with all the little things you need (kettle, toaster, wine glasses...||It was reassuring to see the night manager do a walk through the park and I felt safe and secure the whole time. I don't have a dog, but the park allows them. So it was good to see dogs walking with their owners on lead.||I really enjoyed the closeness to Rye. My family was able to walk tot he pub for a lovely meal and not have to worry about driving. We needed some help to get extra towels as my kids dropped them on the floor and the staff were friendly and helpful.||It was lovely waking up and seeing the park in the daylight. It is really pretty with a mixture of cabins and on-site vans which are all nicely presented. The games room was also a great diversion for the kids on the wet day and the communal toilets look like they've just had a revamp. My only complaint was being beaten on the pool table!||Happy to recommend. I'll be back!

Good and bad. Good was the room when we arrived was warm, the beds were reasonably comfortable, there was milk in the fridge and when the shower finally worked the next day it was good.

Bad was NO HOT WATER and even worse NOT ABLE TO CONTACT  ANYONE WHEN WE ARRIVED TO GET HELP, they didn't answer mobile phone, email, Facebook messenger, no on-site manager, the phone number left for emergency contact listed on the bathroom wall if the toilet overflowed was actually disconnected. You are provided with a mobile number for after 5pm and asked to send a message. We sent messages, no reply. We rang the number, not answered. We emailed, sent message via Facebook messenger. No reply. Called the office phone number in case it was diverted. It wasn't until 8.44am the next morning we received the following sms " So sorry hot water on now! Night manager missed call".

Their "sales team" sent lots of emails welcoming us, then after we left we received another one. No names though.

There were ants on the cushions of the couch and on the small bench in the bedroom.

The exhaust fan in the bathroom was thick with dust, looked grose.

We would have appreciated more than one face washer for two people. Luckily my daughter brought her own.

Very quiet park, only 3  other cabins appeared to be in use.

Having only one phone number for when things go wrong, and that person doesn't answer the phone, I is a disaster. What if the toilet had overflowed, it's happened before obviously for them to have put up a sign in the bathroom.  We had a funeral to go to the next morning and after travelling all day from interstate to get there we were unable to freshen up upon arrival and then not able to contact anyone. What would have happened if there'd been a fire?

I think the main issue was that we were frustrated that we could not raise anyone when we needed help. We had been travelling for 12 hours to get there.

Liked:
- Clean cabin
- Linen provided & clean
- TV worked
- Kitchen clean & sufficient facility
- Comfortable clean bed
- Dog friendly
- Polite caretaker

Disliked:
- Value for money (way too expensive for expectation - we paid $176 for one night)
- Resident dog wandering offleash
- Resident (perm.) walking past cabin frequently
- Car park space on opposite side of cabin main entrance (so needed to walk through gravel/ dirt to unload and load vehicle).
- Had some security concerns
- Atmosphere: Close proximity of others, felt a bit like an outsider (intruder) amongst a close knit community of perm. residents.
- Possum dancing on our roof, keeping us awake

Overall:
We wouldn't choose to stay here again unless no other choice. Can see how some ppl would enjoy this type of place, but it's not for everyone.
Had a good stay at this place, the staff are friendly, the cabin was spotless.

5 stars & above all round.
Beautifully kept park like stepping back in time with peace & quiet.
Clean facilities, fantastic staff who go above & beyond to ensure your stay is a memorable one.
Leave your cares at the gate & relax amongst the autumn leaves & welcoming glamours.
600 metres to both sea & shops.
Cafes, restaurants, live music & sea air ... little slice of heaven in Rye.
Lost count on my visits .. 5? 7? ... very grateful to all at Kanasta keeping the beauty of yesteryear Mornington Peninsula alive & to share.

A caravan park where you should be comfortable living in very close proximity to others. Perhaps it has just been a minute since camping, but it seemed that space is at a premium here. Otherwise, the staff were helpful.

Booking was lost, not 100% sure that was the parks fault, though. Cabin was ok.
The playground needs some maintenance, though.

Great location, clean cabin, helpful and friendly staff. Easy to checkin online, all amenities needed are included.
My mom is in a wheelchair for a fracture, and it was easy enough for her to get around.
Clean shared facilities, dog friendly and pretty cute al round!

Small rooms but hey, you’re at the beach, why would you spend any time in the room?

Our second time staying here. Staff are very friendly. Cabins are perfect for our small family. Pet friendly which is great saves us money putting him into a kennel. Our 2 year old loved the playground. Thank you!
Clean rooms....avoid the games room it smells of urine.

Very simple and no frills kind of place but very lovely staff and friendly atmosphere. Loved that everyone can take their pets .cabins have been basic with essentials but we usually go out and cook some easy meals so enough for this.kitchen could have a few more things like extra bowls for salad .overall a very easy stay,very quiet at night ,beds are very comfortable.
Really awesome experience for me and Family...got a "Hello" and key at the front gate...then everything you'd expect..clean sheets, towels, bathroom..friendly environment..well done 👍

Stayed a week in their cabin and couldn’t be happier with the staff.

Beds comfortable rooms clean beach’s 5 mins walking distance.

Will definitely stay again.
Good place to stay will stay again
I love staying here it's clean and peaceful

A great place to stay with your dog! Very, welcoming and friendly and quiet and peaceful, I highly recommend for a get away. Back from the beach but close enough  to walk to. Very clean, comfortable accommodation. Thank you very much.
A great place to enjoy some time away.

My partner & I & our 2 dogs stayed in a self contained Cabin at Kanasta Caravan Park for 2 weeks. The park is a very short walking distance to many shops restaurants and the Beach. The park cleaners and grounds man keep the cleanliness of the park and cabins at a very high standard, always with a friendly attitude too, always willing to be helpful. We can not speak highly enough of the Park Manager Sue, what an amazing person, with the willingness to help above and beyond, a genuinely caring and friendly nature, so rare... Thank you all so much.... See you all next time. 🌻

Nice quiet caravan park. Wooden screens near all outdoor seating provides a great level of privacy. Cabin contained all we needed and the shower in our cabin was really good. We stayed in a cabin at the back of the property and felt like we had lots of privacy. A great park.

Our cabin was upgraded with no extra fee. The park is so clean, the amenities are fantastic and the customer service is excellent 👌 👏🏼. I left my tracky shoes, and the owner posted it for free. Lovely Sue bless you. We will recommend your park to our friends.

Amazing staff & service. Family friendly, safe & affordable. I have 2 boy’s (11 & 13 )& we stayed in cabin style 4, they provided clean bedding, towels, soap, shampoo, milk, tea, coffee. The cabin has a fully equipped kitchen & microwave. My boy’s loved the games room, it’s short walk to the beach & shops. Highly recommend!
Very welcoming!
Loved the weekend getaway,clean,quiet and close to beach,shops,and best of all comfy beds and hot showers.Will definitely be back...
